blended.narrative: Burke Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 292 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
